title: WorkerOutput
description: Output produced by an AI-OS worker after executing a task.

worker_id.description: Identifier of the worker that produced this output.

status.description: Terminal status of the worker execution.

diff.description: Optional unified git diff of all changes made by this worker.

files_changed.description: List of files modified by this worker.

path.description: File path relative to repository root.

metadata.description: Arbitrary metadata about the worker execution (timing, tool versions, etc.).

completed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the worker finished.
